root_text.an11.1:1.2: ekaṁ samayaṁ bhagavā sāvatthiyaṁ viharati jetavane anāthapiṇḍikassa ārāme.
root_text.an11.1:1.3: Atha kho āyasmā ānando yena bhagavā tenupasaṅkami; upasaṅkamitvā bhagavantaṁ abhivādetvā ekamantaṁ nisīdi. Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā ānando bhagavantaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.an11.1:11.1: Iti kho, ānanda, kusalāni sīlāni avippaṭisāratthāni avippaṭisārānisaṁsāni,
root_text.an11.1:11.11: Iti kho, ānanda, kusalāni sīlāni anupubbena aggāya parentī”ti.

translation_text.an11.1:1.2: At one time the Buddha was staying near Sāvatthī in Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
translation_text.an11.1:1.3: Then Venerable Ānanda went up to the Buddha, bowed, sat down to one side, and said to him:
translation_text.an11.1:1.4: “Sir, what is the purpose and benefit of skillful ethics?”
translation_text.an11.1:1.5: “Ānanda, having no regrets is the purpose and benefit of skillful ethics.”
translation_text.an11.1:2.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of having no regrets?”
translation_text.an11.1:2.2: “Joy is the purpose and benefit of having no regrets.”
translation_text.an11.1:3.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of joy?”
translation_text.an11.1:4.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of rapture?”
translation_text.an11.1:5.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of tranquility?”
translation_text.an11.1:6.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of bliss?”
translation_text.an11.1:7.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of immersion?”
translation_text.an11.1:8.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of truly knowing and seeing?”
translation_text.an11.1:9.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of disillusionment?”
translation_text.an11.1:10.1: “But what is the purpose and benefit of dispassion?”
translation_text.an11.1:10.2: “Knowledge and vision of freedom is the purpose and benefit of dispassion.
translation_text.an11.1:11.1: So, Ānanda, the purpose and benefit of skillful ethics is not having regrets.
translation_text.an11.1:11.2: Joy is the purpose and benefit of not having regrets.
translation_text.an11.1:11.3: Rapture is the purpose and benefit of joy.
translation_text.an11.1:11.4: Tranquility is the purpose and benefit of rapture.
translation_text.an11.1:11.5: Bliss is the purpose and benefit of tranquility.
translation_text.an11.1:11.6: Immersion is the purpose and benefit of bliss.
translation_text.an11.1:11.7: Truly knowing and seeing is the purpose and benefit of immersion.
translation_text.an11.1:11.8: Disillusionment is the purpose and benefit of truly knowing and seeing.
translation_text.an11.1:11.9: Dispassion is the purpose and benefit of disillusionment.
translation_text.an11.1:11.10: And knowledge and vision of freedom is the purpose and benefit of dispassion.
translation_text.an11.1:11.11: So, Ānanda, skillful ethics progressively lead up to the highest.”
